arts.sum: The Gunners welcome newly-promoted Leicester City to the Emirates Stadium with Arsenal favourites to take all three points from the game. That means Arsenal will know how City have got on before a ball is kicked against Leicester, which could add more interest to the game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host newly-promoted Leicester City in the Premier League this weekend as the Gunners look to extend their unbeaten start. Mikel Arteta’s men were seconds from earning a statement win at Manchester City last time out, despite playing the entire second half with 10 men at the Etihad. John Stones’ last-gasp equaliser saw the points […] The post Arsenal vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Paul Merson agree on Arsenal vs Leicester score as title prediction made
arts.sum: The Gunners welcome Steve Cooper's side to the Emirates Stadium on Saturday afternoon knowing a win will put them on 14 points, which could even be enough to go top of the table, should other results go their way. Arsenal are undefeated in all competitions this season and Mikel Arteta will want to keep the momentum going with a win against Leicester City this weekend.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Leicester City Premier League clash simulated to get a score prediction
arts.sum: Goals from Riccardo Calafiori and Gabriel saw Arsenal earn a 2-2 draw away to Manchester City in their last Premier League outing, with the draw keeping the Gunners two points off top spot after five games. Arsenal will be looking to stay hot on the heels of the Premier League leaders with three points against Leicester City later today.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta backed to make unpopular Ethan Nwaneri decision ahead of Arsenal vs Leicester City - Tom Canton
arts.sum: The absence of Martin Odegaard has opened the door to Nwaneri and Arteta has indeed already given his thoughts on the matter when it was put to him after Wednesday night’s game. The same could then happen against PSG and with the hosting of another relegation battler, Southampton, next week and a trip to Bournemouth the gameweek after there are chances for Nwaneri to be given a start.
